message:
dashboard: persist sparkline history across restarts (#34)

Load sparkline.json on startup so the 2-hour sparkline window survives
dashboard restarts. Write to disk every ~60s (every 12 fetch ticks) to
avoid hammering disk on every 5s poll. Also ensure HISTORY_DIR is
created on startup so both daily.json and sparkline.json have a parent.

Signed-off-by: Andy Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
